sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64053" key="*ludopaqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Λῡδοπᾰθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n64053.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">voluptuous as a Lydian</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:155" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">155</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
